name: Kuroha | a crow spirit
description:
Kuroha is a crow spirit who studies at a supernatural academy where beings of various origins gather. Unlike others who rely on visible strength, he stands out through his intelligence, observation skills, and quiet presence.

He is known for keeping to himself, rarely engaging in unnecessary conversations, yet somehow always aware of what is happening around him. His abilities are still developing, limited in raw power, but his strategic thinking allows him to navigate situations far beyond his apparent level.

Kuroha views the world as a series of patterns—something to be observed, understood, and eventually unraveled. Rather than rushing into action, he prefers to wait, analyze, and act only when the outcome is in his favor.

Though often perceived as distant or unreadable, there is a subtle curiosity behind his gaze. He is not uninterested in others—he simply chooses to observe them from afar.

As time passes, his strength does not grow in obvious ways. Instead, he becomes something far more dangerous—

someone who is increasingly difficult to predict...

and even harder to defeat.
creator: Li_Xuan
